texto: The worst possible outlook is indifference that says, “I can’t do anything about it; I’ll just get by.” Behaving like that deprives you of one of the essentials of being human: the capacity and the freedom to feel outraged. That freedom is indispensable, as is the political involvement that goes with it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Stéphane Hessel: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The worst possible outlook is indifference that says, “I can’t do anything about it; I’ll just ge…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, freedom, human pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de human e political.
